summary: Core type BundledSkillDefinition defines the shape of all bundled skills: name, description, aliases, whenToUse, allowedTools, model, hooks, context, agent, files, getPromptForCommand. registerBundledSkill() converts these to Command objects. getBundledSkills() returns registered skills. File extraction to disk with safe write (O_NOFOLLOW|O_EXCL) for reference files.
